340002.name: Mission Hospital
340002.bannerNote: Not under Immediate Jeopardy as of Mar 4, 2026 (4th IJ removed after Enhanced Plan of Correction).

ij.note: Four IJs since 2019 HCA sale; cleared Mar 4, 2026. Sourced from CMS/NCDHHS Form 2567 reporting.

staffRatio.note: CMS HCRIS S-3 FTEs ÷ beds (FY ends Sept). FY2019–FY2020 and FY2025 not in this series yet.

travelers.note: Union/news estimates only — not audited Worksheet S-3. No published single % for 2022–2023; 2024 ~40% union estimate.

starTrend.note: 2018–2024 compiled from CMS archive analyses (Asheville Watchdog / public CMS); 2025 from current CMS HCAHPS release.
